violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors (floor tiles and grout missing or broken) and ceiling (tiles missing or damaged) and wall by back delivery door in the establishment noted needs repair and/or replacing. Walls in the kitchen noted with some screw holes in need of caulking.
